---
title: "CCP_Data_Export"
author: "izb."
format: html
editor: visual
---

# 0.0 Root check

```{r}

getwd()

stopifnot(file.exists("CC_Profile_HvsLM.Rproj"))
```

# Note on Structure:

<!-- CELL A = setup -->

<!-- CELL B = define prepared files to export -->

<!-- CELL C = check source files -->

<!-- CELL D = copy files into data_prep_CCP_output -->

<!-- CELL E = check exported IMS psychometric resource -->

<!-- CELL F = create manifest -->

<!-- CELL G = create README -->

<!-- CELL H = reload check only -->

<!-- CELL I = optional zip -->

These cells create the frozen data bundle for Part B.

These cells create the frozen data bundle.

# 1. Package setup and folder creation

```{r}
# CELL A — Freeze data preparation output: setup

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

dir.create(
  "data_prep_CCP_output",
  showWarnings = FALSE,
  recursive = TRUE
)
```

# 2. — Define prepared files to freeze

```{r}
# CELL B — Define prepared files to freeze

data_prep_files <- tibble::tribble(
  ~source_path, ~target_path, ~role,
  
  "data_clean/l1_corpus_clean.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/l1_corpus_clean.rds",
  "Clean L1-Corpus reference space for PMI/MI plausibility licensing",
  
  "data_clean/human_baseline_clean.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/human_baseline_clean.rds",
  "Frozen human baseline text",
  
  "data_clean/basic_texts_clean.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/basic_texts_clean.rds",
  "Frozen LLM reconstruction texts",
  
  "data_clean/current_paragraph_layer.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/current_paragraph_layer.rds",
  "Paragraph-preserving layer for y4 paragraph overlap",
  
  "measure_outputs/current_texts_parsed.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/current_texts_parsed.rds",
  "Token-level parsed layer from MODUL 5a",
  
  "measure_outputs/parsed_S_layer.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/parsed_S_layer.rds",
  "Sentence-level parsed layer from MODUL 5a",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.rds",
  "Clean IMS psychometric lexicon with concreteness, imageability, and abstractness proxy",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.csv",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.csv",
  "CSV version of clean IMS psychometric lexicon",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_dictionary_concreteness.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_concreteness.rds",
  "Lemma-level IMS concreteness dictionary",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_dictionary_concreteness.csv",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_concreteness.csv",
  "CSV version of IMS concreteness dictionary",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_dictionary_imageability.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_imageability.rds",
  "Lemma-level IMS imageability dictionary",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_dictionary_imageability.csv",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_imageability.csv",
  "CSV version of IMS imageability dictionary",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_dictionary_abstractness_proxy.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_abstractness_proxy.rds",
  "Lemma-level IMS abstractness proxy dictionary",
  
  "measure_outputs/ims_dictionary_abstractness_proxy.csv",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_abstractness_proxy.csv",
  "CSV version of IMS abstractness proxy dictionary"
)

data_prep_files
```

# 3. — Check whether all prepared files exist

```{r}
# CELL C — Check source files


data_prep_files_checked <- data_prep_files |>
  mutate(
    source_exists = file.exists(source_path)
  )

data_prep_files_checked

missing_sources <- data_prep_files_checked |>
  filter(!source_exists)

if (nrow(missing_sources) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Some required source files are missing:\n",
    paste(missing_sources$source_path, collapse = "\n")
  )
}

message("All required prepared source files exist.")
```

# 4. — Copy prepared files into data_prep_CCP_output

```{r}
# CELL D — Copy prepared files into data_prep_CCP_output
walk2(
  data_prep_files_checked$source_path,
  data_prep_files_checked$target_path,
  ~ file.copy(
    from = .x,
    to = .y,
    overwrite = TRUE
  )
)

message("Copied prepared files to data_prep_CCP_output/")
```

# 5. — Clean and save IMS concreteness lexicon

```{r}

# CELL E — Check exported IMS psychometric resource

ims_export_files <- c(
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.csv",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_concreteness.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_imageability.rds",
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_dictionary_abstractness_proxy.rds"
)

missing_ims_export_files <- ims_export_files[!file.exists(ims_export_files)]

if (length(missing_ims_export_files) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Some exported IMS files are missing:\n",
    paste(missing_ims_export_files, collapse = "\n")
  )
}

message("IMS psychometric resource files are present in data_prep_CCP_output/.")
```

# 6. — Create manifest (A manifest is simply an inventory list of the files inside some exported data bundle = create a CSV documentation table listing all exported files and their roles.)

```{r}
# CELL F — Create manifest for data_prep_CCP_output


manifest_data_prep_CCP_output <- data_prep_files_checked |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    target_exists = file.exists(target_path),
    frozen_date = as.character(Sys.Date()),
    target_file_size_bytes = file.info(target_path)$size,
    target_md5 = as.character(tools::md5sum(target_path))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    source_path,
    target_path,
    role,
    source_exists,
    target_exists,
    frozen_date,
    target_file_size_bytes,
    target_md5
  )

readr::write_csv(
  manifest_data_prep_CCP_output,
  "data_prep_CCP_output/manifest_data_prep_CCP_output.csv"
)

manifest_data_prep_CCP_output
```

# 7. — Create README for data_prep_CCP_output

```{r}
# CELL G — Create README for data_prep_CCP_output

readme_text <- c(
  "data_prep_CCP_output",
  "",
  "This folder contains the frozen prepared data for the CCP generation pipeline.",
  "",
  "The earlier part of the R project functions as data preparation.",
  "From MODUL 5b onward, CCP_generation_pipeL reads only from this folder.",
  "",
  "Included core files:",
  "",
  "- l1_corpus_clean.rds: cleaned L1-Corpus reference space",
  "- human_baseline_clean.rds: frozen human baseline text",
  "- basic_texts_clean.rds: frozen LLM reconstruction texts",
  "- current_paragraph_layer.rds: paragraph-preserving layer for y4",
  "- current_texts_parsed.rds: token-level parsed layer from MODUL 5a",
  "- parsed_S_layer.rds: sentence-level parsed layer from MODUL 5a",
  "- ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.rds: cleaned IMS psychometric lexicon for y1",
  "- ims_dictionary_concreteness.rds: lemma-level concreteness dictionary",
  "- ims_dictionary_imageability.rds: lemma-level imageability dictionary",
  "- ims_dictionary_abstractness_proxy.rds: lemma-level abstractness proxy dictionary",
  "",
  "IMS note:",
  "The IMS psychometric resource was prepared before export and is only copied here.",
  "The actual y1 measurement is not computed in this file.",
  "MODUL 5b joins the parsed token lemmas with the IMS psychometric lexicon by lemma.",
  "",
  "Pipeline rule:",
  "Every new module reads existing outputs.",
  "No previous module is regenerated unless explicitly needed.",
  "",
  paste0("Frozen on: ", Sys.Date())
)

writeLines(
  readme_text,
  "data_prep_CCP_output/README_data_prep_CCP_output.txt"
)

message("Saved: data_prep_CCP_output/README_data_prep_CCP_output.txt")
```

# 8. — Reload check for data_prep_CCP_output

```{r}
# CELL H — Reload check for data_prep_CCP_output

check_current_texts_parsed <- readRDS(
  "data_prep_CCP_output/current_texts_parsed.rds"
)

check_parsed_S_layer <- readRDS(
  "data_prep_CCP_output/parsed_S_layer.rds"
)

check_ims_psychometric_lexicon <- readRDS(
  "data_prep_CCP_output/ims_psychometric_lexicon_clean.rds"
)

dplyr::glimpse(check_current_texts_parsed)
dplyr::glimpse(check_parsed_S_layer)
dplyr::glimpse(check_ims_psychometric_lexicon)

check_current_texts_parsed |>
  dplyr::count(text_id)

check_parsed_S_layer |>
  dplyr::count(text_id)

message("Reload check completed successfully.")
```

# 9. — Optional zip for sharing

```{r}
# CELL I — Optional zip for sharing


zip(
  zipfile = "data_prep_CCP_output.zip",
  files = list.files(
    "data_prep_CCP_output",
    full.names = TRUE
  )
)

message("Saved: data_prep_CCP_output.zip")
```

# END of CCP_Data_Export!

```{r}
1 + 1
```

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
